title: (Bee's) Cozier Beds
description: My take on prettier and cosier beds...
body: ### About 🛏️ Everybody loves a comfy bed at home, so why not have one in Minecraft… This resource pack remodels and retextures the vanilla beds to have a bit more detail and look snugger and cosier! This pack is entirely vanilla and does not require any mods to work. That is all. I hope you like it! <3 ### Collections If you like this pack, you should also check out my other ones! They go really well together: - [My **Vanilla+ Collections**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) ∗ a pack of extensive texture improvements, from grass to resources - [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ∗ my take on prettier crop farming with new variable textures and models - [**Fine Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fine-armoury) ∗ many retextures of tools, weapons, and armour - [**Serified Font**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/serified-font) ∗ my take on a much fancier font - [**Fluffy Carpets and Wool**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fluffy-carpets) ∗ my take on much fluffier wool and carpets - [**Banner Pattern Clarity**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity) ∗ provides distinctive (and pretty) banner pattern item textures - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
